category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a scalable distributed version control system; official Mercurial homepage describes it as a free distributed source control management tool.
display_name_sources: Official Mercurial SCM homepage uses “Mercurial SCM”; source_facts.name is mercurial.
docs_sources: Official Mercurial site provides quick start and built-in help documentation for commands and topics.
repo_sources: Official Mercurial contribute page states the development repository is https://foss.heptapod.net/mercurial/mercurial-devel and identifies the historical repository separately.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes distributed source control management; source_facts.executables lists hg and chg; source_facts.description and package metadata support the SCM tags.
